series.type: Array<{ name: string; value: number; max?: number; color?: string }>
series.description: Series rendered outermost to innermost as concentric rings

ringThickness.description: Width of each ring in px (auto-scaled with size when omitted)

arcStart.description: Start angle in degrees (applied to all rings)

arcEnd.description: End angle in degrees (applied to all rings)

trackColor.description: Color of the unfilled portion of every ring

defaultColors.description: Palette used when a series omits color

centerContent.description: Custom slot for arbitrary center content

centerTitle.description: Convenience title text shown in the center

centerValue.description: Convenience big value shown in the center

centerSubLabel.description: Convenience sub-label shown in the center

interactive.description: Hover/focus highlights a series and dims the others

onSeriesClick.description: Fired when a ring or legend item is activated

animate.description: Sweep animation on mount; honors prefers-reduced-motion

tooltip.description: Show tooltip with series details on hover/focus

valueFormatter.type: (s: { name: string; value: number; max: number }) => string
valueFormatter.description: Custom formatter for tooltip and ARIA description

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label override (defaults to series summary)
